**Lysergic acid diethylamide induces increased signalling entropy in rats' prefrontal cortex.** — J Neurochem (2022). DOI: 10.1111/jnc.15534. PMID: 34729786. Psychedelic drugs are gaining attention from the scientific community as potential new compounds for the treatment of psychiatric diseases such as mood and substance use disorders. The 5-HT2A receptor has been identified as the main molecular target, and early studies pointed to an effect on the expression of neuroplasticity genes.
